tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
    delete UBUNTU_HOST
    edit "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    move 2 before 100
    move 3 before 100
    move 4 before 100
end
show firewall address
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     delete UBUNTU_HOST
The entry is used by other 3 entries
Command fail. Return code -23

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UBUNTU_HOST"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UBUNTU_HOST) #         set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.25 5

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UBUNTU_HOST) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 2 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 3 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 4 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid ee7bab9e-21e1-51f1-415e-a75f4428d225
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid ee7bb328-21e1-51f1-dfaa-29963439de12
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid ee7bb864-21e1-51f1-27a0-1623c8cd443e
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid ee7bbc60-21e1-51f1-f659-dd34d348e591
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid ee7bc084-21e1-51f1-274c-314c62441136
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid ee7bc494-21e1-51f1-e86c-a66ac2a3eab7
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid ee7bc872-21e1-51f1-e261-ea4590a458d3
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid ef7ef01e-21e1-51f1-b4bd-c1a980a157da
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid ef7ef226-21e1-51f1-da93-94f6aca94ab5
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid ef7ef3f2-21e1-51f1-cce7-1fe23f3db30a
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid ef7f8e8e-21e1-51f1-3b0e-a3f701bf4adc
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 36df29e2-21e2-51f1-b820-638e33f73368
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 36e20eb4-21e2-51f1-484f-09e4d4e713bf
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid 39f2ab2c-21e2-51f1-89c1-3320bb9c134d
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set uuid 19bd0754-29cf-51f1-73b1-43874e38fb71
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "LAN_SUBNET"
        set uuid 19c8406a-29cf-51f1-e48a-5e41bcb0d7c6
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_LAN"
        set uuid 19ed20ba-29cf-51f1-b458-95231f342a5e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "LAN_SUBNET"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
    next
    edit 3
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_INTERNET"
        set uuid 1a17ff9c-29cf-51f1-1f30-c78a3d60243c
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS" "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
edit 4
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUT"
        set uuid 1a40e2e0-29cf-51f1-acb8-318b22eae11b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
